microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a **2-person operation** into a platformized system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, global commercial model aligned with regional team needs.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in **4 months** with a 94% recovery rate, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new lifecycle management model for continuous validation across the portfolio.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, coordinating global stakeholders across matrixed teams under high-stakes commercial deadlines.

Scaled team leverage through AI-driven automation, building an internal AI agent and restructuring planning workflows to **reduce cycle time by 39%** and increase drill capacity by 21%, freeing bandwidth for higher-impact strategic and KOL-facing commercial activities.
microsoft_2023: Championed **product adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting user demos and training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key teams, supported sales enablement goals, and saved **37 engineering hours** monthly across the Azure organization.

Shaped the downstream product roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by facilitating **11+ user interviews** with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and translating physician-equivalent customer insights into actionable, evidence-based requirements.

Optimized data integrity and retrieval by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool, cutting lookup time by 83% and improving field team access to customer-facing assets and technical content.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework, coordinating buy-in across 140+ teams in a highly matrixed, geographically diverse global environment.

Mobilized a **global product strategy** to reduce launch toil, conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to identify 81 hours of manual effort per region and building a lifecycle roadmap to automate critical paths and improve commercial execution at scale.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps, prioritize high-impact investments, and monitor campaign-equivalent KPIs to drive market share performance decisions with data-backed precision.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and coordinating cross-functional alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering in a fast-paced environment.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets**, stabilize the developer intake process, and maintain on-track lifecycle execution aligned with broader program milestones and deadlines.

Drove strategic alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a scalable, compliant release model supporting multi-site commercial rollout objectives.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflows for 200+ monthly proposals via a new CRM process, improving sales enablement and field team efficiency across a high-volume, customer-facing commercial operation.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversion rates by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google profile to improve competitive positioning and downstream customer adoption in local markets.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records to identify and seal margin leaks, delivering data-driven recommendations that informed budget allocation and ROI tracking across the portfolio.
